zh.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可文費爾德
zh.Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Pêche於大約1271年出生在英國坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾時，她的父親John Pêche17歲，母親Margaret Moyne23歲。她於1293年之前與Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington在英國素福爾可文費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1305年10月5日在英國素福爾可文費爾德享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Pêche于大约1271年出生在英国坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾时，她的父亲John Pêche17岁，母亲Margaret Moyne23岁。她于1293年之前与Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington在英国素福爾可文費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1305年10月5日在英国素福爾可文費爾德享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Pêche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Pêche was born about 1271, in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John Pêche, was 17 and her mother, Margaret Moyne, was 23. She married Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington before 1293, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 5 October 1305, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Pêche est née environ 1271, à Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Pêche, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moyne, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington avant 1293, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1305, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Pêche um 1271 in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Pêche 17 und ihre Mutter Margaret Moyne 23. Sie hat vor 1293 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1305 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Wingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pêche è nata il circa 1271 nel Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John Pêche, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Margaret Moyne, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington prima del 1293, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 5 ottobre 1305, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウィングフィールド
ja.Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオル
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Pêcheが約1271年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオルで生まれた時，父John Pêcheは17歳，母Margaret Moyneは23歳であった。1293年以前にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドでSir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Denningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1305年10月5日にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Pêche(이)가 대략 1271년 영국 캄브리지실르 스와프함 프리어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Pêche(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Moyne(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1293년 이전 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 10월 5일 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pêche nasceu aproximadamente 1271, em Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pêche, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moyne, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington antes 1293, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1305, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Pêche родилась около 1271 г. в местности сваффхам приор, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Pêche было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moyne, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington перед 1293 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 5 октября 1305 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Pêche nació aproximadamente 1271, en Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Pêche, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Margaret Moyne, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington antes de 1293, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1305, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
